chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S- 807 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 3369/23 3.For hearing of main case 27-03-2025 None present for the petitioners ***** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2023 and since then no serious efforts were made to have the matter fixed in Court, which shows that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
